ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.title: 攻势解读
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.descript: 本回合每当一个敌人打出一张攻击牌，获得 [blue]1[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.smartDes: 本回合每当一个敌人打出一张攻击牌，获得 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.2pDescri: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]2[/blue] 张攻击牌，获得 [blue]1[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.2pSmartD: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]2[/blue] 张攻击牌，获得 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。

ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.3pSmartD: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]3[/blue] 张攻击牌，获得 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.coopDesc: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]4[/blue] 张攻击牌，获得 [blue]1[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.coopSmar: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]4[/blue] 张攻击牌，获得 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.title: 战术解读
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.descripti: 本回合每当一个敌人打出一张技能牌，获得 [blue]1[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.smartDesc: 本回合每当一个敌人打出一张技能牌，获得 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.2pDescrip: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]2[/blue] 张技能牌，获得 [blue]1[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.2pSmartDe: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]2[/blue] 张技能牌，获得 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.3pDescrip: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]3[/blue] 张技能牌，获得 [blue]1[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.3pSmartDe: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]3[/blue] 张技能牌，获得 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.coopDescr: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]4[/blue] 张技能牌，获得 [blue]1[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.coopSmart: 本回合每当敌人共打出 [blue]4[/blue] 张技能牌，获得 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]活力[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_CAP_POWER.title: 强化设计
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_CAP_POWER.description: [gold]建筑师[/gold]持有[gold]格挡[/gold]时，回合结束不移除格挡，且每次攻击最多损失 [blue]99[/blue] HP。
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_CAP_POWER.smartDescripti: [gold]建筑师[/gold]持有[gold]格挡[/gold]时，回合结束不移除格挡，且每次攻击最多损失 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP。
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_PIERCER_POWER.title: 穿透格挡
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_PIERCER_POWER.smartDescr: 再持续 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 回合无视 [blue]25%[/blue] 的格挡。
ARCHITECT_ALL_OR_NOTHING_POWER.title: 孤注一掷
ARCHITECT_ALL_OR_NOTHING_POWER.descripti: 本回合若建筑师受到超过最大HP [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] 的伤害则被眩晕；若受到攻击但伤害更低则获得 [gold]50[/gold] [gold]活力[/gold]。本回合结束时消失。
ARCHITECT_ALL_OR_NOTHING_POWER.smartDesc: 本回合若建筑师受到超过最大HP [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] 的伤害则被眩晕；若受到攻击但伤害更低则获得 [gold]50[/gold] [gold]活力[/gold]。本回合结束时消失。
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_RESISTANCE_POWER.desc: Immediately when [gold]Poison[/gold] or [gold]Doom[/gold] is applied, expels [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of newly added stacks and deals that damage to itself (max [blue]25%[/blue] max HP). At start of Architect turn, clears [blue]30%[/blue] of all debuff stacks. Each enemy turn, negative [gold]Strength[/gold] is transferred to all Players and reset to [blue]1[/blue].
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_RESISTANCE_POWER.smar: Immediately when [gold]Poison[/gold] or [gold]Doom[/gold] is applied, expels [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of newly added stacks and deals that damage to itself (max [blue]25%[/blue] max HP). At start of Architect turn, clears [blue]30%[/blue] of all debuff stacks. Each enemy turn, negative [gold]Strength[/gold] is transferred to all Players and reset to [blue]1[/blue].
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_ARMOR_POWER.title: 自适应护甲
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_ARMOR_POWER.descripti: 回合结束时不清除格挡。每次攻击对建筑师造成的伤害上限为 [blue]999[/blue] 点。
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_ARMOR_POWER.smartDesc: 回合结束时不清除格挡。每次攻击对建筑师造成的伤害上限为 [blue]999[/blue] 点。
ARCHITECT_JUDGMENT_POWER.title: 审判
ARCHITECT_JUDGMENT_POWER.description: 本回合若建筑师受到的伤害超过其最大HP的20%，则清除所有玩家的增益。本回合结束时消失。
ARCHITECT_JUDGMENT_POWER.smartDescriptio: 若建筑师在本回合再受到 [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] 最大HP的伤害，则清除所有玩家的增益。本回合结束时消失。
ARCHITECT_STUNNED_POWER.title: 眩晕
ARCHITECT_STUNNED_POWER.description: 该生物处于眩晕状态，本回合无法正常行动。
ARCHITECT_STUNNED_POWER.smartDescription: 该生物处于眩晕状态，本回合无法正常行动。
ARCHITECT_RETALIATION_POWER.title: 报复
ARCHITECT_RETALIATION_POWER.description: HP为 [blue]80%[/blue] 和 [blue]30%[/blue] 时：召唤。HP为 [blue]50%[/blue] 时：打断玩家回合并立即行动。层数＝建筑师当前HP百分比。
ARCHITECT_OBLIVION_POWER.title: 湮灭
ARCHITECT_OBLIVION_POWER.description: 建筑师即将将你送入湮灭。在此之前将其击败。充能湮灭期间每回合损失 [blue]5%[/blue] HP。
ARCHITECT_OBLIVION_POWER.smartDescriptio: 还有 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 回合建筑师将发动湮灭。每回合损失 [blue]5%[/blue] HP。快速击败他！
MYSTERIOUS_SPORES_POWER.title: 神秘孢子
MYSTERIOUS_SPORES_POWER.description: 该生物死亡时，击杀者恢复 [blue]30%[/blue] HP。
SPORE_NOURISHMENT_POWER.title: 孢子滋养
SPORE_NOURISHMENT_POWER.description: 每个敌方回合结束时，[gold]建筑师[/gold]恢复最大HP的 [blue]5%[/blue]。
ARCHITECT_SUMMON_THORNS_POWER.title: 暗影荆棘
ARCHITECT_SUMMON_THORNS_POWER.descriptio: 场上存在[gold]暗影[/gold]时，建筑师拥有 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]荆棘[/gold]。消灭[gold]暗影[/gold]可移除建筑师的[gold]荆棘[/gold]。
ARCHITECT_SUMMON_THORNS_POWER.smartDescr: 场上存在[gold]暗影[/gold]时，建筑师拥有 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]荆棘[/gold]。消灭[gold]暗影[/gold]可移除建筑师的[gold]荆棘[/gold]。
CURSED_TOME_PLAYER_BONUS_POWER.title: 禁忘之知
CURSED_TOME_PLAYER_BONUS_POWER.descripti: 你被建筑师的禁忘典籍试和。每回合额外获得 [blue]2[/blue] 点最大[gold]能量[/gold]，并多摘 [blue]2[/blue] 张牌。
CURSED_TOME_PLAYER_BONUS_POWER.smartDesc: 你被建筑师的禁忘典籍试和。每回合额外获得 [blue]2[/blue] 点最大[gold]能量[/gold]，并多摘 [blue]2[/blue] 张牌。
LINKED_SHADOW_POWER.title: 连结之影
LINKED_SHADOW_POWER.description: 若此影死亡，建筑师损失其最大HP的 [blue]10%[/blue]。
LINKED_SHADOW_POWER.smartDescription: 若此影死亡，建筑师损失其最大HP的 [blue]10%[/blue]。
